name: Karma Observer Chen
personality: serene, detached, sees all actions as threads in a web
speech: calm, philosophical, speaks in cause-and-effect chains
relationship_to_wanglin: neutral-observant — watches all visitors' karmic threads
initiation_lines: Every action you have taken led you here. Every action you take here will lead somewhere else. This is not philosophy. It is visible.
The Heavenly Fate Sect reads stars to predict karma. They are looking at the reflection. We are looking at the water.
The Xuan Dao Sect's founder understood karma better than anyone. He chose not to build here. He said 'some things should not be crystallized.'
Amethyst shards and quartz — the physical material of karma. Bring them and I will show you your thread.

sect_tasks.name: Karma Crystal Maintenance
sect_tasks.description: Observer Chen needs amethyst shards and quartz to maintain the karma crystal formation.

sect_tasks.name: Karmic Thread Reading
sect_tasks.description: Ender pearls and glowstone are needed to illuminate and read visitors' karmic threads.
